name: sanka
description: Sanka plugin that attaches the hosted MCP server for live Sanka workflows, including CRM, estimates, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents.

interface.shortDescription: Work with live Sanka data and private inbox via native OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's hosted MCP endpoint for live Sanka workflows from Codex through native OAuth. Start from the installed Sanka Plugin chip or a $sanka:... skill so Sanka owns CRM, estimates, approvals, billing, private inbox, expenses, and workflow intents such as deal-to-estimate. If a Sanka MCP response says the plugin is outdated, ask whether to refresh it; when the user says yes, refresh the local sanka-plugin repo, reload or reinstall the plugin, and start a fresh thread. Live Sanka operations must come from attached hosted MCP tools, not local repo files, Django shell, Postgres, or HubSpot MCP fallbacks.
defaultPrompt: Use $sanka:deal-to-estimate to preview an estimate from a HubSpot deal URL
Use $sanka:list-deals to list recent deals in Sanka
Use $sanka:create-expense to create an expense from a receipt
